documents.title: Phishing incident notes
documents.content: The security team reviewed a synthetic phishing email drill. The mail gateway flagged the sender domain because it failed SPF and DMARC checks. Analysts confirmed the message used an urgent invoice theme and asked users to open a fake attachment.

documents.title: Password reset runbook
documents.content: The help desk password reset runbook requires identity verification, a temporary reset link, and a forced password change at next sign-in. The runbook does not describe phishing detection.

queries.query: how was the phishing email detected
expectedChunkContains: mail gateway flagged the sender domain

queries.query: what happens after a password reset link
expectedChunkContains: forced password change at next sign-in
